'''鈭歱-th-th''' ('''pathatha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yes|yes]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-th-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yes|yes]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歱-th-th
|-
! Lemma
| pathatha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pathathithi|pathathithi]] || [[word:pathathiji|pathathiji]] || [[word:pathathishi|pathathishi]] || [[word:pathathi|pathathi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:pathathuthuth|pathathuthuth]] || [[word:pathathujuj|pathathujuj]] || [[word:pathathushush|pathathushush]] || [[word:pathath|pathath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:pathathuthu|pathathuthu]] || [[word:pathathuju|pathathuju]] || [[word:pathathushu|pathathushu]] || [[word:pathathu|pathathu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:pathathufuth|pathathufuth]] || [[word:pathathufuj|pathathufuj]] || [[word:pathathufush|pathathufush]] || [[word:pathathuf|pathathuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pathathethe|pathathethe]] || [[word:pathatheje|pathatheje]] || [[word:pathatheshe|pathatheshe]] || [[word:pathathe|pathathe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pathathothoth|pathathothoth]] || [[word:pathathojoj|pathathojoj]] || [[word:pathathoshosh|pathathoshosh]] || [[word:pathath|pathath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pathathotho|pathathotho]] || [[word:pathathojo|pathathojo]] || [[word:pathathosho|pathathosho]] || [[word:pathatho|pathatho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pathathofoth|pathathofoth]] || [[word:pathathofoj|pathathofoj]] || [[word:pathathofosh|pathathofosh]] || [[word:pathathof|pathathof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pathath忙th忙|pathath忙th忙]] || [[word:pathath忙j忙|pathath忙j忙]] || [[word:pathath忙sh忙|pathath忙sh忙]] || [[word:pathath忙|pathath忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pathathathath|pathathathath]] || [[word:pathathajaj|pathathajaj]] || [[word:pathathashash|pathathashash]] || [[word:pathath|pathath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:pathathatha|pathathatha]] || [[word:pathathaja|pathathaja]] || [[word:pathathasha|pathathasha]] || [[word:pathatha|pathatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:pathathafath|pathathafath]] || [[word:pathathafaj|pathathafaj]] || [[word:pathathafash|pathathafash]] || [[word:pathathaf|pathathaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:pathathasha|pathathasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gopathathasha|gopathathasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokipathathasha|gokipathathasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:pathathn眉sha|pathathn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gopathathnkn眉sha|gopathathnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokipathathn眉sha|gokipathathn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pathathsh毛sha|pathathsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopathathnksh毛sha|gopathathnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipathathsh毛sha|gokipathathsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pathathrosha|pathathrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopathathnkrosha|gopathathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipathathrosha|gokipathathrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pathathmusha|pathathmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gopathathnkmusha|gopathathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipathathmusha|gokipathathmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:pathathsherasha|pathathsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gopathathnksherasha|gopathathnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokipathathsherasha|gokipathathsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:pathathngasha|pathathngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gopathathnkngasha|gopathathnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokipathathngasha|gokipathathngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:pathathyasha|pathathyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gopathathnkyasha|gopathathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokipathathyasha|gokipathathyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:pathathyamasha|pathathyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gopathathnkyamasha|gopathathnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokipathathyamasha|gokipathathyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:pathathn眉sh毛sha|pathathn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopathathnkn眉sh毛sha|gopathathnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipathathn眉sh毛sha|gokipathathn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:pathathn眉rosha|pathathn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopathathnkn眉rosha|gopathathnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipathathn眉rosha|gokipathathn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pathathn眉musha|pathathn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopathathnkn眉musha|gopathathnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipathathn眉musha|gokipathathn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:pathathsh毛n眉sha|pathathsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopathathnksh毛n眉sha|gopathathnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipathathsh毛n眉sha|gokipathathsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:pathathsh毛rosha|pathathsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopathathnksh毛rosha|gopathathnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipathathsh毛rosha|gokipathathsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pathathsh毛musha|pathathsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopathathnksh毛musha|gopathathnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipathathsh毛musha|gokipathathsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:pathathron眉sha|pathathron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopathathnkron眉sha|gopathathnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipathathron眉sha|gokipathathron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:pathathrosh毛sha|pathathrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopathathnkrosh毛sha|gopathathnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipathathrosh毛sha|gokipathathrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pathathromusha|pathathromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopathathnkromusha|gopathathnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipathathromusha|gokipathathromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:pathathmun眉sha|pathathmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopathathnkmun眉sha|gopathathnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipathathmun眉sha|gokipathathmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:pathathmush毛sha|pathathmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopathathnkmush毛sha|gopathathnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipathathmush毛sha|gokipathathmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:pathathmurosha|pathathmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopathathnkmurosha|gopathathnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipathathmurosha|gokipathathmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:pathath|pathath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:p忙th忙th|p忙th忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hopathath|hopathath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hop忙th忙th|hop忙th忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohopathath|hohopathath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohop忙th忙th|hohop忙th忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉pathath|n眉pathath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉p忙th忙th|n眉p忙th忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉pathath|n眉n眉pathath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉p忙th忙th|n眉n眉p忙th忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂pathath|n茂pathath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂p忙th忙th|n茂p忙th忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂pathath|n茂n茂pathath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂p忙th忙th|n茂n茂p忙th忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lupathath|lupathath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lup忙th忙th|lup忙th忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulupathath|lulupathath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulup忙th忙th|lulup忙th忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lipathath|lipathath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lip忙th忙th|lip忙th忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilipathath|lilipathath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilip忙th忙th|lilip忙th忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kopathath|kopathath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kop忙th忙th|kop忙th忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokopathath|kokopathath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokop忙th忙th|kokop忙th忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kepathath|kepathath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kep忙th忙th|kep忙th忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekepathath|kekepathath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekep忙th忙th|kekep忙th忙th]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
